title: MigrationRequest (v1)
description: Agent-signed declaration of intent to migrate from the source relay. The relay MUST issue a MigrationToken for any valid request from a registered agent — destination, reason, and other factors MUST NOT gate issuance. See spec/migration-v1.md §3.1.

motebit_id.description: Agent's motebit identity (UUIDv7). The signer of this request.

destination_relay.description: Optional URL or relay_id of the intended destination. Source relay MUST NOT condition token issuance on this value (foundation law §4.3) — it's informational only.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for migration. Source relay MUST NOT condition token issuance on this value — informational only.

requested_at.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the agent issued the request.

suite.description: Cryptosuite identifier. Always `motebit-jcs-ed25519-b64-v1` for migration artifacts: JCS canonicalization (RFC 8785), Ed25519 primitive, base64url signature, hex public key. Verifiers reject missing or unknown values fail-closed.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over `canonicalJson(body)` where `body` = the artifact minus `signature`. Signed by the agent.
